note: Trinity first end-to-end Useful Compute payment milestone on mainnet. The Trinity Useful Compute pipeline (Sprints 5.6 through 5.18d) ran end-to-end for one accepted worker result: request -> 2 worker results -> replay validation -> governance batch -> budget -> payment proposal -> real-signed draft -> human broadcast receipt -> confirmed RPC transaction. txid=787cda89dec3d31f40b6281e10ba1b711685e4a713d4117a4e44dccd616f2d82, block=8512 mainnet, 2026-05-13, payment=31,500 stocks (0.000315 SOST), fee=202 stocks (exactly at S8 floor of 1 stock/byte over a 1-in 2-out 202-byte serialised tx). Self-send test: source and destination resolved to the same wallet, so block explorers may label the outputs as 'change' / 'payment sent 0.0000 SOST' — the reward output exists in vout[0] for 31,500 stocks and is recorded across the proof bundle (proposal + draft + receipt + on-chain RPC). Proof bundle: TRINITY_FIRST_USEFUL_COMPUTE_PAYMENT_PROOF_20260513T190442Z/. Website updates (docs-only): sost-explorer.html — // USEFUL COMPUTE STACK section bumped to Sprints 5.6-5.18d, sprint table extended with 5.16/5.17/5.18, pipeline diagram updated to '... -> human broadcast -> on-chain (block 8512)', new // FIRST USEFUL COMPUTE PAYMENT ON CHAIN block added with txid/payment/fee/source/destination/safety invariants. sost-trinity.html — // 05B section renamed to 'SPRINTS 5.6 - 5.18d', sprint table extended with 5.17/5.18/5.18b/5.18c/5.18d rows, pipeline list extended to 10 steps ending in 'on-chain confirmed', new // FIRST PAYMENT MILESTONE panel below the table, // 14 ROADMAP gains SHIPPED rows for 5.17/5.18/5.18b/5.18c/5.18d. No src/, include/, scripts/ or tests/ changes. No consensus, RPC, wallet, signer or wire-format change.
